summary: Comprehensive testing of ThreadlyCo Design Studio completed successfully. All critical features working including authentication, AI design generation, approval workflow, and settings management.
passed_tests: Backend API health check and all 12 endpoints (100% success rate)
Login page loads with email/password form
Admin authentication with correct credentials
Stats dashboard displays 4 stat cards correctly
Trend Explorer shows 16 pre-populated niches
Search functionality filters niches by name
Heat level filters (All/Hot/Rising/Steady) work correctly
Niche card navigation to Design Generator page
Product type dropdown with all 8 options
AI design generation using Claude API (generates 5 designs)
Design card selection opens approval panel
Approval panel has all required editable fields
Product approval and database storage works
Settings page loads with all configuration fields
Printify API key and Shop ID fields present
Product pricing fields for all 8 product types
Settings save functionality works
Sidebar navigation between pages
Logout functionality and route protection
Mobile responsive design elements

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (20/21 tests passing - 1 minor UI state issue)
